DP.219.0000:
Something huge is going to happen,
I think...maybe. Right?\f
Don’t meddle around! Of course,
you’re going to, aren’t you?\f
That’s why the two of us will team up
to take you down to the ground!\f
DP.219.0001:
Something huge is going to happen,
I think...maybe. Right?\f
Don’t meddle around! Of course,
you’re going to, aren’t you?\f
That’s why the two of us will team up
to take you down to the ground!\f
Oh, but you have only one Pokémon?
Scram, then!\f
DP.219.0002:
Well, that was just pathetic...\f
We’re just gonna let you pass so you
can get pulverized by our bosses!
DP.219.0003:
Boss: ...\f
Now, all will end.
And everything will begin.\f
With this Red Chain I will pry open
the portal to another dimension.\f
I command that you unleash your
power for me...\f
DIALGA, the mythical Pokémon, and
the master of time!\f
DP.219.0004:
Boss: ...\f
Now, all will end.
And everything will begin.\f
With this Red Chain I will pry open
the portal to another dimension.\f
I command that you unleash your
power for me...\f
PALKIA, the mythical Pokémon, and
the master of space and dimensions!\f
DP.219.0005:
Boss: ...This will bring about the
destruction of all things.\f
With everything gone, there will be
no fighting and no strife.\f
Can you feel time distorting?
Only I can choose to stop it.\f
DP.219.0006:
Boss: ...This will bring about the
destruction of all things.\f
With everything gone, there will be
no fighting and no strife.\f
Feel the dimensions distorting...
Only I can stop it.\f
DP.219.0007:
Boss: This is the mythical Pokémon
that created Sinnoh!\f
DIALGA, the ancient deity of time!\f
DP.219.0008:
Boss: This is the mythical Pokémon
that created Sinnoh!\f
PALKIA, the ancient deity of space
and the dimensions!\f
DP.219.0011:
Boss: This world cannot be molded
into the ultimate world I seek!\f
It’s far easier to create an entirely
new world than to change this one!\f
A new world in which I am the ruler
of all things! I shall become a deity!
DP.219.0012:
Mars: There’s no need to rush.\f
I can understand you want to battle
our boss real bad, but you’ll have\r
to go through me first.\f
After all, you’ve made me look bad
more times than I care to remember!\f
DP.219.0013:
Jupiter: And I’ll be next.\f
You might be tough, but this time,
the gloves are coming off!\f
DP.219.0014:
[0103,0000]: Hold on one second!\f
Don’t you start the party without
me!\f
DP.219.0015:
Jupiter: Humph!\f
Well, if it isn’t the little boy who
ran off crying at Lake Acuity!\f
Did you get any tougher since then?
We’ll beat you two-on-two!\f
DP.219.0016:
Mars: You don’t think you can just
run off now, do you?\f
DP.219.0018:
Jupiter: Oh? You chickening out now?\f
You finally realized that you can’t
beat our boss, eh?\f
DP.219.0019:
Jupiter: What’s the matter?
Don’t tell me you’re shaking?
DP.219.0020:
[0103,0000]: ...Heh.
My Pokémon are tough, right?\r
I can get even tougher!\f
...But, you know, that’s it for us.
We’ve hit the wall...\f
[0103,0001], I’ll help you with
this!\f
DP.219.0022:
[0103,0000]: Hey, [0103,0001]!
This is it! It’s your show now!
DP.219.0023:
Boss: Oh! DIALGA...
This is...\f
Fantastic!
Beautiful!\f
It’s the creation of a new galaxy!
My new world!\f
DP.219.0024:
Boss: Oh! PALKIA...
This is...\f
Fantastic!
Beautiful!\f
It’s the creation of a new galaxy!
My new world!\f
DP.219.0029:
Boss: ...!\f
The Red Chain!
It crumbled away to nothing?!\f
But why?\f
Why would MESPRIT, the Pokémon of
Lake Verity, appear by your side?\f
But never mind that!
It’s all destroyed!\r
My galaxy is gone!\f
...I won’t allow this...\f
I will capture those three again
and craft another Red Chain!\f
But before I even think about that,
I’m going to completely crush you!
DP.219.0030:
Boss: ...!\f
What is truly the ultimate to you?
What do you consider perfection?\f
The most important thing...
What shines the brightest...\f
...Telling you is meaningless.
But I will not give up.\f
I will become a deity one day...
And I will make the ultimate mine...
DP.219.0031:
Boss: ...!\f
What is truly the ultimate to you?
What do you consider perfection?\f
The most beautiful thing...
Joy that shines the brightest...\f
...Telling you is meaningless.
But I will not give up.\f
I will become a deity one day...
And I will make the ultimate mine...
DP.219.0034:
DIALGA returned to the world from
which it came...
DP.219.0035:
PALKIA returned to the world from
which it came...
DP.219.0036:
Rowan: DIALGA, the master of
time...\f
It’s impossible to tell if it is
enraged or saddened...\f
But to me, DIALGA appears to be
waiting for you, [0103,0000]...\f
It seems to be challenging you
as a test...\f
Go on, [0103,0000].
Face up to DIALGA!\f
Listen to its heart.
Understand its thoughts.\f
DIALGA is out of control after being
dragged out by the Red Chain\r
and forced to use its power.\f
DIALGA seems to be entrusting you
with stopping it...
DP.219.0037:
Rowan: PALKIA, the master of
space and the dimensions...\f
It’s impossible to tell if it is
enraged or saddened...\f
But to me, PALKIA appears to be
waiting for you, [0103,0000]...\f
It seems to be challenging you
as a test...\f
Go on, [0103,0000].
Face up to PALKIA!\f
Listen to its heart.
Understand its thoughts.\f
PALKIA is out of control after being
dragged out by the Red Chain\r
and forced to use its power.\f
PALKIA seems to be entrusting you
with stopping it...
DP.219.0038:
Rowan: Go on, [0103,0000].
Face up to the Pokémon!\f
Listen to its heart.
Understand its thoughts.\f
The mythical Pokémon seems to be
entrusting you with stopping it...\f
DP.219.0039:
Dawn: [0103,0000]... I ran into
[0103,0001] a little while ago.\f
He said that he believed in you,
[0103,0000].\f
He said that you could get the job
done.\f
I feel the same way.\f
Please help that Pokémon!\f
It’s suffering from being dragged
out by Team Galactic!
DP.219.0040:
Lucas: [0103,0000]...
I just ran into [0103,0001].\f
He said that he believed in you,
[0103,0000].\f
He said that you could get the job
done.\f
I think so too.\f
You’ve got to help that Pokémon!\f
It’s suffering from being dragged
out by Team Galactic!
DP.219.0041:
Rowan: [0103,0001]!
I don’t know how...\f
You were magnificent.
Truly, you were incredible.\f
I’ve lived for sixty years, but I’ve
never been thrilled like this!\f
DP.219.0042:
Dawn: Since the last time, the
professor did a lot of research...\f
He became very concerned about you,
[0103,0001], so he came out to\r
a place as treacherous as this...\f
[0103,0001], I’m so glad you’re
safe.\f
Let’s go home!\f
DP.219.0043:
Lucas: Since the last time, the
professor did a lot of research...\f
He became very worried about you,
[0103,0001], so he came out to\r
a place as terrible as this...\f
[0103,0001], I’m glad to see
you’re safe.\f
Let’s leave this place already!\f
DP.219.0044:
Rowan: No one has the right to take
away anyone’s future or anyone’s\r
world...
DP.219.0045:
Rowan: [0103,0000], I’ll be looking
forward to seeing your Pokédex.\f
Go wherever you’ve never visited
before.\f
That way, you should see Pokémon
you haven’t yet seen.
DP.219.0046:
Dawn: ...You know, that Pokémon was
extraordinary, wasn’t it?\f
Was it really the Pokémon that
created the Sinnoh region...?
DP.219.0047:
Lucas: ...You know, that Pokémon was
extraordinary, wasn’t it?\f
Was it really the Pokémon that
created the Sinnoh region...?
DP.219.0048:
[0103,0000]’s Azure Flute is
making a sound.\f
Would you like to play
the Azure Flute?
DP.219.0051:
The Azure Flute’s notes rang hollowly
to no effect...\f
It appears to be useless here...
